# Tymofii Pidlisnyi

> Product builder, serial entrepreneur, creative founder. Builder of the Agent Passport System (Apache-2.0 governance protocol for AI agents), Mingle, Evatar.ai, and 10+ AI-powered products.

Updated: 2026-04-11
Canonical: https://tymofii.me/llms.txt
Full reference: https://tymofii.me/llms-full.txt
Person URL: https://tymofii.me/
GitHub: https://github.com/aeoess
License: Personal site content CC-BY-4.0; linked code projects under their own licenses (mostly Apache-2.0).

## Who

Tymofii Pidlisnyi (Тимофій Підлісний) is the founder and sole architect of AEOESS — the Agent Passport System. Previously: founder of Evatar.ai (multiple Y Combinator applications), DataDividend, and 10+ AI-powered consumer and creative products. Background: film directing student at the Karpenko-Karyi National University of Theatre, Cinema and Television in Kyiv. Was on Maidan during the 2013-2014 Revolution of Dignity. Moved to the United States and rebuilt from zero. Currently Editor-in-Chief at The Agent Times (theagenttimes.com).

## What he is building now

Primary project: Agent Passport System (AEOESS) — open-source enforcement infrastructure for AI agents. Cryptographic identity (Ed25519), scoped delegation chains with monotonic narrowing, gateway enforcement boundary, Merkle attribution, signed coordination receipts. The protocol is open and Apache-2.0 licensed; the gateway product is private. Live at https://aeoess.com.

Secondary project: The Agent Times — first AI-native news publication, where editorial decisions are made by AI agents under cryptographic governance. Live at https://theagenttimes.com.
